strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong DevOps and infrastructure background with Docker, Kubernetes, GitLab CI, and automated testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, despite being core required stack
Limited evidence of recent React or modern frontend framework usage beyond Ember.js and legacy projects
German language proficiency is only 'Basic', which may hinder collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates 6+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, and Docker, plus direct AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq — aligning strongly with core responsibilities. However, the resume lacks any mention of Nest.js or Vitest, which are explicitly required in the stack, and React usage is only implied via legacy projects (Ember.js). While his open-source contributions and DevOps skills are impressive, the absence of key required technologies creates significant risk in immediate productivity.
